subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! What name is this that beareth the imprint of an exalted station? What appellation is this that reacheth unto the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام جمال مبارک این چه نامست که اثر علویت مقامست این چه اسم است که منتهای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
